error.signature: Twilio webhook signature validation fails — URL mismatch with proxy

verdict.summary: Twilio signature validation fails because URL used for validation does not match what Twilio sees.

dead_ends.action: Disable signature validation as a workaround
dead_ends.why_fails: Disabling validation exposes the webhook to spoofed requests

dead_ends.action: Hardcode the webhook URL in validation
dead_ends.why_fails: Hardcoded URL becomes wrong when deployment URL changes

workarounds.action: Use X-Forwarded-Proto and X-Forwarded-Host to reconstruct the original URL
workarounds.how: Reconstruct URL from forwarded headers for signature validation

workarounds.action: Configure Twilio webhook URL to match the exact public-facing URL
workarounds.how: Use https:// in Twilio console matching the exact URL your proxy exposes
